meta.title: Summonware — Software, Summoned. AI-Forward Custom Builds
meta.description: Summonware is an AI-forward software house. Tell us the outcome — we summon the product: custom software, AI systems, and design that ships.

hero.description: Even one call is enough to start. Tell us the outcome you need — we summon the product: scoped, designed, and built with an AI-accelerated pipeline that never steals your quarter.

steps.name: ai-systems
steps.title: Turn a workflow into an AI engine
steps.text: We build agents and pipelines around your real operations. Describe the process once — then watch it run itself. Automate the grind, keep the judgment calls.

steps.name: custom-software
steps.title: Unlimited product, instantly scoped
steps.text: Great software without hiring and firefighting a dev org — or full control if you want it. Web apps, platforms, internal tools: clean architecture, yours to keep.

steps.name: product-design
steps.title: Design that sells before it ships
steps.text: Interfaces your customers actually enjoy — researched, prototyped, and tested. We design the journey first, so engineering builds the right thing once.

steps.name: launch-support
steps.title: Keep it alive after launch
steps.text: Monitoring, iteration, and growth features on a retainer that flexes with you. Your product keeps improving while you run the business.

ecommerce-customer-data-platform.name: Ecommerce Customer Data Platform
ecommerce-customer-data-platform.blurb: Unifies customer data across every storefront and channel into one profile — AI-scored, always current, ready for marketing and support to act on.

ocr-ingestion-auto-action.name: OCR Ingestion & Auto-Action
ocr-ingestion-auto-action.blurb: Scans incoming documents, extracts the data with OCR, and automatically triggers the right downstream action — no manual re-entry, no waiting.

it-security-hardening.name: IT Security Hardening
it-security-hardening.blurb: Audits, patches, and locks down your stack — least-privilege access, dependency hygiene, and monitoring that catches problems before they're incidents.

microsoft-solutions.name: Microsoft Solutions
microsoft-solutions.blurb: Builds and connects across the Microsoft ecosystem — Power Platform, 365, and Azure — so your existing tools finally work together.

iot-device-network.name: IoT Device Network
iot-device-network.blurb: Connects sensors and devices into one monitored network — real-time telemetry, alerts, and a dashboard that makes the fleet legible.

security-configuration-hardening.name: Security Configuration Hardening
security-configuration-hardening.blurb: Continuously checks every server, endpoint, and database against security baselines like CIS Benchmark — and fixes what's out of line automatically.

security-control-validation.name: Security Control Validation
security-control-validation.blurb: Simulates real attack techniques against your firewall, EDR, SIEM, and incident response process — so you know what actually catches an attack, not just what's installed.

automated-attack-simulation.name: Automated Attack Simulation
automated-attack-simulation.blurb: AI-planned, continuous red-teaming that maps every real path an attacker could take — from phishing to lateral movement to data exfiltration — instead of a once-a-year pentest.

ecommerce-customer-data-platform.intro: Every storefront, app, and support channel was capturing its own slice of the customer — never the whole picture. We built a unified data platform that merges every touchpoint into one live profile per customer, scored and segmented by AI, so marketing and support teams finally work from the same truth.

features.title: Unified profiles
features.desc: Every order, message, and click resolves to one customer record, not five disconnected ones across your stack.

features.title: AI scoring
features.desc: Each profile carries a live propensity and churn score, updated as new behavior comes in — not recalculated once a quarter.

features.title: Real-time sync
features.desc: Changes in any connected channel propagate everywhere else within seconds, so support never sees stale data.

features.title: Built-in activation
features.desc: Segments plug straight into your existing marketing and support tools — no separate export step.

ecommerce-customer-data-platform.ctaHeadingHtml: Want your customer data working this hard?
ecommerce-customer-data-platform.ctaBody: We'll map your current data sprawl and show you what a unified platform actually looks like for your stack.

ocr-ingestion-auto-action.intro: Incoming invoices, forms, and contracts were landing in an inbox and waiting for someone to type them into the system by hand. We built a pipeline that reads every document the moment it arrives, extracts the fields that matter, and fires the right downstream action automatically — approvals, entries, notifications — with no manual re-typing.

features.title: Any-format ingestion
features.desc: PDFs, scans, and photos of paper all go through the same OCR pipeline — no separate handling per source.

features.title: Field-level extraction
features.desc: Pulls the specific data your workflow needs, not just raw text, mapped straight to your existing system's fields.

features.title: Confidence-based routing
features.desc: High-confidence documents auto-process; anything uncertain routes to a human for a quick check, never silently guessed.

features.title: Action, not just data
features.desc: Extraction triggers the real next step — an entry, an approval request, a notification — instead of leaving you a CSV to act on manually.

ocr-ingestion-auto-action.ctaHeadingHtml: Still re-typing what a document already told you?
ocr-ingestion-auto-action.ctaBody: Send us a sample of what you process and we'll show you what automatic ingestion looks like for it.

it-security-hardening.intro: Most breaches don't start with a zero-day — they start with a default password, an over-permissioned service account, or a dependency nobody patched. We audit your stack end to end and lock it down: access tightened to least-privilege, dependencies kept current, and monitoring in place that catches drift before it becomes an incident.

features.title: Full-stack audit
features.desc: Servers, cloud accounts, and dependencies reviewed against real attack patterns, not a generic checklist.

features.title: Least-privilege access
features.desc: Every account and service gets exactly the access it needs to do its job — nothing left open "just in case."

features.title: Dependency hygiene
features.desc: Outdated and vulnerable packages get tracked and patched on a schedule, not discovered during an incident.

features.title: Drift monitoring
features.desc: Once hardened, we watch for configuration drift so today's fix doesn't quietly unwind in six months.

it-security-hardening.ctaBody: A hardening audit tells you exactly where you stand — before someone else finds out first.

microsoft-solutions.intro: Most teams already own the Microsoft stack — they just aren't using it as one system. We build and connect across Power Platform, 365, and Azure so the tools you're already paying for finally talk to each other, instead of living as five disconnected apps with the same data typed in five times.

features.title: Power Platform apps
features.desc: Custom internal tools built on Power Apps and Power Automate — fast to ship, easy for your team to maintain.

features.title: 365 integration
features.desc: Teams, SharePoint, and Outlook wired into your actual workflows, not left as a separate island from the rest of your systems.

features.title: Azure backend
features.desc: Custom services and data pipelines on Azure where Power Platform alone isn't enough.

features.title: One connected system
features.desc: Data flows between every connected tool automatically, so nobody's re-entering the same information twice.

microsoft-solutions.ctaHeadingHtml: Paying for Microsoft tools that don't talk to each other?
microsoft-solutions.ctaBody: Tell us your current stack and we'll show you what's possible with what you already own.

iot-device-network.intro: A fleet of sensors and devices scattered across sites is only useful if someone can actually see what they're reporting. We connect the hardware into one monitored network — real-time telemetry, alerting on the thresholds that matter, and a single dashboard that turns a hundred blinking devices into one legible picture.

features.title: Fleet onboarding
features.desc: New sensors and devices join the network with a standard provisioning flow — no bespoke setup per site.

features.title: Real-time telemetry
features.desc: Live data from every connected device, not a batch upload that's already an hour stale by the time you see it.

features.title: Threshold alerting
features.desc: Get notified the moment a device drifts out of range — before it becomes a site visit.

features.title: One fleet dashboard
features.desc: Every device, every site, one screen — status at a glance instead of stitching together per-vendor apps.

iot-device-network.ctaBody: We'll show you what one unified view of your connected hardware actually looks like.

security-configuration-hardening.intro: Security configuration drifts quietly — a service left open, a weak password policy, a logging gap nobody notices until it's an incident. We built a platform that continuously discovers every server, endpoint, network device, and database in your environment, checks each one against recognized baselines like CIS Benchmark, and scores the real risk — not just a pass or fail.

features.title: Full asset discovery
features.desc: Finds every server, endpoint, and database in your environment — including the ones nobody remembered to document.

features.title: Baseline scoring
features.desc: Every system gets a hardening score against CIS Benchmark or your own internal policy, so risk is measured, not guessed.

features.title: Guided or automatic remediation
features.desc: Fixes are recommended with exact steps — or applied automatically where you've approved it, safely and reversibly.

features.title: Audit-ready reporting
features.desc: Generates the reports your compliance and audit process actually needs, without a manual evidence-gathering scramble.

security-configuration-hardening.ctaBody: Most teams find out what's misconfigured during an incident. We'll show you sooner.

security-control-validation.intro: Buying a firewall, an EDR, and a SIEM doesn't tell you whether they actually stop anything — only testing them against real attack behavior does. We continuously validate your security controls against MITRE ATT&CK-mapped techniques: confirming each system is configured correctly, measuring how much it actually detects and blocks, and checking whether your SOC catches the multi-step attack, not just the individual alerts.

features.title: Readiness checks
features.desc: Confirms your security tools are actually configured right — features enabled, signatures current, logs reaching your SIEM, clocks in sync.

features.title: Attack simulation
features.desc: Runs real attack techniques against firewall, IPS, WAF, EDR, and email security, and scores what actually got detected or blocked.

features.title: Detection validation
features.desc: Tests whether your SIEM and SOC correlate a multi-step attack into one real alert — and where alert fatigue and false positives are coming from.

features.title: Response timing
features.desc: Measures the full incident path from alert to resolution — MTTD, MTTR, and exactly where the process stalls.

security-control-validation.ctaBody: We'll run it against real attack behavior and show you the gap between installed and effective.

automated-attack-simulation.intro: An annual penetration test tells you what was true on the day someone tested it. We built a continuous, AI-planned red-teaming system that maps the real attack paths available in your environment right now — phishing and initial access, exploitation and privilege escalation, lateral movement, and how far data could actually travel before it left the building.

features.title: AI-planned attack paths
features.desc: AI plans and adapts each simulated attack the way a real adversary would — not a fixed script run on a schedule.

features.title: Full kill-chain coverage
features.desc: Covers initial access through lateral movement to data exfiltration, so you see the whole path, not one isolated technique.

features.title: Continuous, not annual
features.desc: Runs on an ongoing basis, so a new path opened by last week's change gets caught this week, not at next year's pentest.

features.title: Prioritized findings
features.desc: Every finding ranks by how reachable and damaging it actually is, so remediation starts with what matters most.

automated-attack-simulation.ctaHeadingHtml: When was your last real attack path actually mapped?
automated-attack-simulation.ctaBody: We'll show you what an attacker could reach in your environment today — not last year.

trust.sub: Built to pass security review, not just sprint review.

cards.title: Data handled under PDPA
cards.body: Every project follows Thailand's Personal Data Protection Act from day one — data minimization, consent handling, and access logging built in, not bolted on.

cards.title: In-country hosting available
cards.body: Deploy on Thailand-based infrastructure when data residency is a requirement, not a preference.

start.copy: A formal discovery call to scope it. Fixed proposal within 5 business days. We work inside your procurement process — NDA available on request, no commitment until you see the plan.
start.success: Thank you — your request is in. We'll follow up within one business day to schedule the discovery call.

items.a: An AI-forward software house. We replace your need for an agency, a dev team, a design studio, and an AI consultancy — one partner that takes an idea to a shipped product with pro-level quality and AI-accelerated delivery built in.
Anyone with a product to build — from startups to SMEs to regulated enterprises and public-sector teams. We adapt the engagement to your process, whether that's a quick MVP or a formal RFP.

items.q: How does the AI-accelerated pipeline work?
items.a: Every task runs through our internal tooling built on frontier models — code generation, review, test synthesis, and docs. Humans make the calls; the pipeline removes the grind. You get senior output at roughly twice the pace.
First working demo in about two weeks including scoping and design. The discovery-to-proposal step itself is around five business days.

footer.heading: Any questions?
footer.stack: services — AI solutions · custom software · security · IoT hardware

notFound.body: This page doesn't exist — the link might be broken, or it moved.

comingSoon.body: We're building something new here. Check back soon, or reach out directly in the meantime.
